Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Donna Quan (415-986-8122) of Michael B. Bassi A Law Corporatio for Defendant/Moving party Carole Malloy.
No other appearances.

Not srgued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CAROLE MOLLOY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege facts showing that Carole Molloy, as trustee of the Living Trust has adverse claim to the property; (2) allege facts re: severance of joint tenancy in light of the authorities cited by the Defendant; (3) allege separately a claim for quiet title, or for cancellation of instruments, or both; (4) allege facts re: CCP 761.020(d).
